summary: S3 — pure-JS hot-path schema-drift scan + install path + CI constant guard. The implementation was committed (b8b2066) by a prior claude-sonnet-4-6 chat that registered the session start (3859066) but stopped without closing out; this claude-opus-4-8 chat took over, critically reviewed the diff, verified it green, and closed out. Deliverable per the S1-locked S3 scope: (1) claude-session-start-invoker.js gains CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION = 4 + scanSchemaDrift(workspaceRoot) — reads docs/session-sets/*/session-state.json, compares each schemaVersion to the bundled constant, emits a terse one-line summary on drift (clean = silent, fail-open), NO ai_router import + NO network so it works with an absent/stale router; chained after start_session in main() with start_session errors logged-not-fatal so the scan always runs. (2) installOrchestratorHookClaudeCode.ts: success toast mentions both start_session + drift scan, plus a 'Copy manual setup' button (invoker download URL + settings.json stanza) for extension-less repos. (3) test_invoker_schema_constant.py: CI guard pinning the JS constant == ai_router SCHEMA_VERSION. (4) ai-led-session-workflow.md Step 1 documents the guard. Verification: Python 22 passed (constant guard + check_migrations); TS 561 passing / 2 failing where both failures pre-exist in unrelated files (commit c2a336f, Set 026) and the invoker's own suite passes. SCOPE FLAG (carried to S4/S5): the end-of-set 'Explorer UX revision' deliverable (asterisk + 'Ran under schema v<N>' tooltip replacing the (needs migration) row description; single title-bar 'Upgrade older session sets' icon running the corrected three-migrator bulk chain) is in End-of-set deliverables but unassigned to any session's Steps and was NOT done in S3 — it needs a home in S4 or S5. No router invoked; $0 added to the $10 set NTE.

reason.specifics: S4 implements Feature 2 (NNN- prefix convention + two-surface number->slug resolver in ai_router and a minimal extension command) AND must absorb the carried scope decision: where the unassigned end-of-set 'Explorer UX revision' deliverable (asterisk/tooltip + bulk-upgrade title-bar icon) lands — S4 (natural fit, S4 already touches the extension) vs. S5. The cross-surface coordination (ai_router resolver + start_session integration + extension command + authoring-guide reconciliation + the corrected three-migrator bulk chain wired into a title-bar action) plus that open scope call warrant high effort.
